testcase.classname: Add a new board in Trello
testcase.name: Successfully create a new board - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given browser is open.......................................................passed And user is log in using f223635@cfd.nu.edu.pk and password==true...........passed When user clicks create button..............................................passed And user enters Board Title sample board....................................passed And user clicks create......................................................passed Then User should see the new board..........................................passed
